seoTitle: Luc Rousseau | React / frontend developer resume
seoDescription: Luc Rousseau's resume as a React and frontend developer: component architecture, hooks, application state and modern build. 26 years of web engineering. Quebec and remote.
tagline: React interfaces in TypeScript: component architecture, hooks and application state. 26 years of web engineering, now focused on React.

summary.title: Profile
summary.content:
Senior frontend developer with 26 years of web engineering, I focus on React. I have built complex React applications in TypeScript: reusable stateful components, hooks, composition, and Redux-style application state (via @wordpress/data), with a webpack/Babel build.

Much of this work took the form of advanced custom blocks in the Gutenberg ecosystem, which is React in full. Public repo on GitHub (lucrousseau/Luc-Rousseau-Consulting); this site (Next.js/React) as a live proof point. Code reviews, performance and automated tests (Jest, Testing Library) are part of my senior practice.

items.label: React up front, PHP/Laravel and APIs behind

items.title: Component architecture
items.content: Reusable React components in TypeScript: composition, props, contexts and nested component trees.

items.title: State and data
items.content: Hooks (useState, useEffect), Redux-style application state (@wordpress/data), selectors, actions and API calls.

items.title: Build and integration
items.content: webpack, Babel, npm and Git; integrating React into existing web ecosystems.

items.title: Senior engineering
items.content: 26 years in the craft: performance, maintainability, code reviews, mentoring. I own a new stack fast.
